comment: Universal.IronOcr v0.1-preview model manifest. See claude-session/CDN/CDN-SETUP-2026-05-22.md for schema details. | Tesseract re-cut 2026-06-03: per-language tessdata_fast default (commit 874164186573), script-packs retained as opt-in under scriptPacks. | defaultLanguage=en, defaultEngines=all (lazy first-call download; scriptPack excluded) added 2026-06-03.

EasyOCR Traditional Chinese rec model (ch_tra_g2) pending sourcing; engineCoverage.parseq=false until v0.x. Colloquial Cantonese characters (嘅 喺 咁 啲 嘢 嚟) not well-supported by HanT.traineddata or any EasyOCR Chinese model — matches legacy product coverage.
